name: Mini Monte Cristo Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces (4 slices) Swiss or Fontina Cheese
recipeInstructions:
- Use either type of cheese, but not both.
- Blend 2 tablespoons butter with mustard; spread evenly on each bread slice. Top each of the four bread slices with an equal amount of cheese and ham, then top with the remaining bread slices, buttered side down. Cut each sandwich into 4 triangles.
- Beat eggs, milk, and golden onion soup mix until well blended. Dip sandwiches in egg mixture, coating them thoroughly.
- In a large skillet, melt 1/4 cup butter and cook the sandwiches over medium heat, turning once, until they are golden brown.
- Makes about 16 mini sandwiches
